description_long: This is a hand-painted Russian matryoshka doll, featuring a rounded, bulbous shape with a smooth, hard exterior. The doll is predominantly white with intricate blue floral patterns and decorative motifs wrapping around its body. The front displays a stylized female face with large, blue eyes, long eyelashes, rosy cheeks, and a small red mouth, framed by a painted section of blonde hair. The blue floral designs are most concentrated on the lower half, with lighter blue gradients and scattered blue dots accentuating the upper portion. The base appears slightly textured and darker, suggesting wear or a different material finish. The overall appearance is charming and traditional, with a glossy, painted surface typical of wooden nesting dolls.
description: A hand-painted Russian matryoshka doll with blue floral patterns on a white background, featuring a stylized female face and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face with large blue eyes, rosy cheeks, and detailed blue floral patterns on the body.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the continuation of blue floral motifs and the transition from the face to the back, with visible gradient shading.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the doll, dominated by blue and white gradients and floral accents, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view highlighting the curvature of the doll and the wraparound floral designs, with a partial glimpse of the face.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is painted to resemble a traditional Russian folk dress, featuring a blue floral pattern on a white background, with stylized motifs reminiscent of Gzhel porcelain art. The upper body is adorned with a painted blue shawl or scarf, and the lower section is decorated with ornate blue flowers and leaves.
attribute_pose: The doll is depicted in a static, upright position with no visible limbs; the body is a single, rounded form with the head seamlessly integrated into the torso.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a smiling facial expression, with wide blue eyes, long painted eyelashes, arched eyebrows, rosy cheeks, and a small red mouth.
attribute_hair_style: Short, painted blonde hair with a side part, visible only on the upper front of the head.
